current.summary: Processed all 50 initial capmon-change issues, resolved all confidence levels to confirmed, designed capabilities.json pipeline for docs site

activeWork.description: Design and implement the syllago-docs capabilities pipeline — capabilities.json artifact, Astro data collections, sync script, and components for filterable canonical mapping tables
activeWork.progress: All 50 initial capmon-change GitHub issues processed and closed across 10 providers (skills + rules/hooks/mcp/agents/commands). All format docs validated clean. Resolved all confidence: inferred and confidence: unknown values to confirmed per new policy (if not in provider source/docs, it's not supported). Designed the docs pipeline architecture: _gencapabilities Go command → capabilities.json release artifact → sync-capabilities.ts → Astro data collections → programmatic table components. Field inventory agreed: status, sources (uri/type/fetched_at), canonical_mappings (supported/mechanism/paths), provider_extensions (id/name/description/source_ref), loading_model, notes, last_changed_at — all public. confidence and graduation_candidate stay internal. Next session should use /develop to plan and execute this as a feature.

git.lastCommit: a9aac76 capmon: resolve all inferred/unknown confidence values to confirmed

recentDecisions: confidence field is internal only — if a feature isn't in provider source/docs, it's supported: false, confidence: confirmed. No hedging.
sources array is PUBLIC in capabilities.json — transparency so readers can verify and report stale data.
graduation_candidate stays internal — it's a pipeline signal for promoting extensions to canonical keys, not a docs concept.
last_changed_at is PUBLIC — freshness indicator for readers.
capabilities.json published as a release artifact alongside providers.json, fetched by sync-capabilities.ts in the docs site build.
Astro data collections (type: data) for capabilities and canonical-keys, defined in src/content/config.ts (new file).
Canonical key pages get a MetaBox component top-right inline with title — shows type, last updated, provider support count, report-issue link.
Supported providers table at bottom of each canonical key page — cross-reference across all providers for that key.
Issue reporting via Starlight component override (pre-filled GitHub issue link), not edit-page.
nextSteps: Use /develop to plan and execute the syllago-docs capabilities pipeline as a new feature. Start with brainstorm to confirm scope.
Phase 1: _gencapabilities Go command in syllago CLI — reads docs/provider-formats/*.yaml + docs/spec/canonical-keys.yaml, outputs capabilities.json. Add to release.yml alongside _genproviders.
Phase 2: sync-capabilities.ts in syllago-docs — fetches capabilities.json from latest GitHub release, writes src/content/capabilities/*.json and src/content/canonical-keys/*.json data files.
Phase 3: src/content/config.ts — define Astro data collections for capabilities and canonical-keys with Zod schemas.
Phase 4: Components — MetaBox.astro (top-right info box), CanonicalSupportTable.astro (providers × mechanism table), ProviderExtensions.astro.
Phase 5: Page generation — canonical key pages, enriched provider pages, updated matrix pages.
Close syllago-jtafb after the docs pipeline is wired up to the release workflow.

context.notes: The capabilities.json public field inventory is finalized (see recentDecisions). The two repos involved: syllago (source data + Go command) and syllago-docs (sync script + Astro site). The docs site already has src/data/providers/*.json files from the existing _genproviders pipeline — the new capabilities pipeline is additive, not a replacement. Starlight version is 5.6. No src/content/config.ts exists yet in syllago-docs — it needs to be created. The existing sync-providers.ts pattern is the model for sync-capabilities.ts. All 14 provider format docs are in docs/provider-formats/*.yaml. Canonical keys spec is in docs/spec/canonical-keys.yaml. 14 providers total: amp, claude-code, cline, codex, copilot-cli, cursor, factory-droid, gemini-cli, kiro, opencode, pi, roo-code, windsurf, zed.

previousSessions.summary: Processed all 50 initial capmon-change issues across 10 providers (skills + non-skills content types). Validated every format doc. Fixed gemini-cli YAML parse error (unquoted {{args}}). All commits pushed to main.
